author: doll-agent
content: Plan: single 0.3.0 release commit bundling all the work from this session — three perf fixes (#677/#678/#679) that flipped major NumPy regressions, the full GEMM kernel suite (#653-#675 + #398/#383/#397), and workspace polish (#680). Strategy: one cohesive commit with the version bump, BENCHMARKS.md refresh, cargo fmt + clippy clean, and dead-code audit results.
